hook.summary: Mr. Monopoly and Hello Kitty dance together to announce a collaboration.
hook.visual_action: Mr. Monopoly and Hello Kitty are dancing against a vibrant pink background with floating music notes and brand logos.
hook.text_overlay: MONOPOLY GO! HELLO KITTY AND FRIENDS

scene_flow: Mr. Monopoly and Hello Kitty dance together on a pink background.
Pochacco and Cinnamoroll are introduced with sparkling star effects.
Pompompurin and Kuromi join the celebration with confetti and music notes.
The full cast of characters dances on a Monopoly board in a colorful city setting under a rainbow.
Final call to action screen showing the event dates and a 'Play Now' button.
audience_proxy: Fans of Sanrio characters and casual mobile gamers who enjoy social, upbeat experiences.
